function.message: The weekly view helped, but the reminder tone got annoying again. Please make it quieter or stop shipping features into the house.
function.rulebook_notes: Completed required identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD files when entering folders, and used channel logs as message-history source.
